nasb.text: For wisdom is better than jewels; And all desirable things cannot compare with her.

esv.text: for wisdom is better than jewels, and all that you may desire cannot compare with her.

cnv.text: 因為智慧比紅寶石更好， 你一切所喜愛的都不能和智慧比較。

ccb.text: 因为智慧比宝石更珍贵， 一切美物都不能与之相比。

csbs.text: 因为智慧比红宝石更美好， 人所喜悦的一切都无法与她相比。
